chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 航空航天电气系统互联组件方案商获数千万融资，细分赛道市占率第一
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，青岛北辰航天航天科技有限公司（下称“北辰航天”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由云启资本独家投资，翊荣资本担任长期独家财务顾问。

北辰航天旗下全资子公司青岛北辰数智科技有限公司成立于2014年，长期深耕航空航天电气系统互联组件研制领域，提供从设计到组装的系统工程解决方案。

电气系统互联是航天器的五大核心组成之一，类似于人体的“神经与血管”，承担电源分配、信号传输、测量控制等关键功能，具有高复杂度与高可靠性要求。随着商业航天、深空探测及低空飞行器的发展，仪器布局与电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计及配套电气系统互联组件产品正迎来新的需求增长。

据了解，北辰航天早期即以体制内外协方身份参与航天领域电气系统互联系统设计，深度参与多项运载型号的三维设计工作，技术成熟度行业领先。

经过十余年积累，北辰航天已具备面向航空航天企业的全流程一站式服务能力，从设备构型布局、电气系

chinese_news.title: 获高秉强、蓝驰领投数千万融资，浙大00后创业者从远景观测切入AI智能影像｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，星识（宁波）科技有限公司（以下简称“星识科技”）近日连续完成天使+轮和天使++轮融资，累计金额达数千万元。两轮融资分别由高秉强教授旗下高锋耐心资本和蓝驰创投领投、松禾资本跟投，老股东清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛持续加注。本轮资金将主要用于智能影像核心技术研发、新品矩阵打造和产品体验的迭代优化，以及生产体系与供应链能力建设。此前，公司已获得李泽湘教授旗下宁波智能技术研究院、清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛的种子轮及天使轮投资。

星识科技是一家专注智能影像技术研发与硬件制造的企业，以远景观测场景为切点，曾推出融合AI功能的Vizta智能望远镜，已在Kickstarter和Indiegogo众筹达数百万元。

望远镜作为长期被传统光学巨头主导的市场，正在被新生代创业者以消费级的智能化产品重新撬动。星识科技巧妙地通过结构设计与AI算法创新，将手机变为智能望远镜，不仅低成本、高效地实现了远景观测和拍摄的一体性，还通过AI功能进一步降低了产品操作门槛、丰富了产品玩法和趣味性。这种软硬件融合的创新解决

chinese_news.title: 「维新宇航」完成数千万元天使+轮融资，7座3吨级eVTOL将于7月进行首飞测试｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，低空出行产品研制商「维新宇航」已完成数千万元天使+轮融资，本轮融资由策源资本领投、金舵投资跟投，资金将主要用于加速公司首款主力机型 Vector 5的研发迭代、首飞测试与适航取证进程。

维新宇航成立于2023年，是36氪长期关注的企业，其专注于大载客量、大载重eVTOL/eCTOL产品的研发及制造。加上6个月前连续完成的种子轮、天使轮，目前维新宇航已完成三轮融资，累计资金交割总额超亿元人民币。

现阶段，维新��航的主力机型Vector 5为一款7座3吨级纯电复合翼eVTOL，该机型专注于应急救援和医疗急救等民生刚需场景，最大起飞重量为3180kg、最大载荷为680kg，最大航程300km、最高巡航速度为 250km/h，全尺寸样机已于去年6月正式下线。

chinese_news.title: 卡位黄金价格带，问界M6向下争夺年轻群体｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
2026年的中国新能源SUV市场正经历着前所未有的内卷。

问界依托华为技术体系，推出了定位更亲民的全新车型 M6， 瞄准主流家用消费群体。放在问界品牌整体销量连续数月下滑、赛力斯盈利能力承压的背景下，M6的到来既是“救兵”，更是一场不容有失的“大考”。

卡位黄金价格带，向下争夺年轻群体

从产品命名逻辑看，M6位于M5与M7之间，车身尺寸为4960×1985×1736mm，轴距2950mm，属于标准的中大型五座SUV。官方定位为“新锐智慧SUV”，目标用户从问界以往的主力“30岁以上家庭用户和商务人群”向下延伸至25-35岁城市年轻群体。

25-30万元是目前中国新能源SUV市场竞争最激烈的价格带——特斯拉Model Y、理想L6、小鹏G6、比亚迪唐等车型均在此区间鏖战。作为参考，理想L6起售价24.98万元，小鹏G6起售价20.99万元，Model Y后驱版26.35万元。问界M6以25.98万元起售，锚定的正是理想L6的核心区间，试图以更低门槛的增程方案和更激进的全系标配策略争夺年轻家庭用户。

chinese_news.title: 小红书四年AI 路：FOMO、犹豫，到突然加速
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 肖思佳

编辑 | 乔芊 杨轩

所有互联网大中厂都渴望在AI时代博得位置，在这场比赛中，小红书曾是克制的那个。

在一个搜索属性与社区属性并存，以真实经验分享为核心的产品中，活人感与AI、温情和算法，始终像天平的两端。

很长一段时间里，小红书既没有完全缺席技术探索，也没有像许多同行那样高调推进AI产品化。相反，这家公司始终在两股力量的拉锯和平衡中前行：一边持续投入模型能力，一边谨慎控制AI对社区生态的介入。

但2026年，随着Agent叙事的升温，小红书开始显露出某种急迫。

4月30日，小红书发送全员内部信，宣布成立AI一级部门Dots，“建立从模型研发、基础设施、工程到产品的完整技术体系，整合顶尖AI人才和资源。”Dots向小红书新任总裁柯南汇报。

据36氪了解，Dots部门由原人文智能实验室Hi Lab升级而来，下设模型研发、基础设施、工程、产品四个部门。目前小红书内部最重要的AI应用产品“点点”也被纳入该

chinese_news.title: 第一代全固态电池迈入规模化市场，「纯锂新能源」完成数千万元Pre-A+轮融资 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 张冰冰

编辑 | 阿至

36氪获悉，北京纯锂新能源科技有限公司（以下简称「纯锂新能源」）近日宣布完成数千万元Pre-A+轮融资，投资方为亦庄国投，云道资本担任独家财务顾问，资金将用于产品研发、市场拓展及产线落地。

「纯锂新能源」成立于2022年5月，聚焦全固态电池研发，通过自研复合电解质及超临界包覆工艺，破解全固态电池核心固固接触难题。2023年4月在北京亦庄建成小试线，量产10Ah全固态电芯；2023年5月在河南兰考县国电投新能源产业园启动建设500MWh规模量产线；2024年10月实现50Ah全固态电芯量产。

「纯锂新能源」于2025年推出第一代固态电池，全固态产品平均失重率0.023%，产品通过第三方国家标准实验室安全认证（CNAS）GB/T36276-2018 检测，目前正优先推进储能场景落地，并在低速动力等方向开展验证，为后续进入更广泛动力电池市场积累工程与商业化基础。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the CLARITY Act pass the Senate Banking Committee by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CLARITY Act markup scheduled for May 14, 2026—critical near-term catalyst with crypto industry heavily lobbying for passage.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC, Cointelegraph (May 5, 2026) — markup vote imminent; crypto exchanges actively shaping final language.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $85,000 by end of Q2 2026 (June 30)?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC holding above $80k with 6 consecutive weeks of spot ETF inflows (first in 9 months); Fed chair transition uncertainty and Iran geopolitical premium both supportive.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (spot Bitcoin ETFs, May 5); CNBC (oil/energy supply shock from Iran blockade); macro uncertainty around new Fed leadership.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum outperform Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio) by 15%+ by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BlackRock tokenization push and SEC Atkins signaling new onchain finance rules—institutional Ethereum demand inflection vs. BTC macro hedge positioning.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (BlackRock fund offerings, May 5); SEC chair market structure hearing (May 8, 2026); AI agent wallet rebuild trend favoring ETH L2s.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Nvidia's equity bets portfolio exceed $50 billion by end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Nvidia disclosed $40B+ deployed in 2026 YTD with aggressive AI infrastructure investing; syndication capacity and deal velocity suggest threshold breach plausible.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (May 5)—Nvidia investor relations; follow quarterly 10-Q filings through Q3 2026.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Trump-Xi summit occur before September 1, 2026 without tariff deal finalization?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran geopolitical crisis delaying rare earth and supply chain negotiations; summit timing is flex point with immediate market implications for tech/commodity equities.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (May 5)—Trump-Xi tariff delay reporting; monitor White House/State Department press calendars through summer 2026.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will total US vehicle loan outstanding exceed $1.5 trillion by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve Z.1 Financial Accounts of the United States (quarterly release); Consumer Financial Protection Bureau auto lending reports.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Capital One data shows payment-to-income ratio stable despite median payments rising $135 (2019–2026); suggests credit expansion secular uptrend. Market underprices auto credit resilience in potential recession scenario.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (May 5) auto lending stability story; median car payment jump $390→$525 signals strong demand and refinance activity.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SEC formally propose rules for AI-driven onchain finance by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC Federal Register (proposed rule notices); SEC chair press releases and congressional testimony transcripts.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SEC Chair Atkins signaling rulemaking intent, but formal proposal pipeline slow-moving. Market has not priced binary risk of accelerated timeline vs. regulatory delay.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (May 5)—SEC Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets and AI finance; Senate Banking Committee structure hearing May 8.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Iran's oil blockade of Strait of Hormuz reduce global crude supply by >2 million barrels/day for 30+ consecutive days in 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report; IEA Oil Market Report; Platts Crude Flow Tracker.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports "loss of nearly a billion barrels with shortage growing worse every day"—suggests escalating disruption path. Oil markets pricing in partial recovery; asymmetric upside tail ignored.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (May 5)—Iran Strait blockade; US sanctions on China/Iran energy entities; Trump-Xi summit delays suggest geopolitical tension durability.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana (SOL) daily active users exceed 500,000 by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Solana blockchain on-chain metrics (Solscan, Blockworks Research, Glassnode); DeFi Llama protocol TVL and active address counts.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: AI agent wallet rebuild trend (Trust Wallet, Mesh) targeting Solana; LayerZero exploit recovery narrative shifts MEV/composability preference. Ecosystem scaling velocity underestimated.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (May 5)—Consensus Miami AI agent wallet talks; trending tokens (Solana leading); LayerZero exploit does not dent ecosystem momentum.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Stripe or PayPal announce a major tokenization partnership with a top-5 US bank by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Company press releases (Stripe, PayPal, JPMorgan, BofA, Citigroup, Wells Fargo, Goldman Sachs); SEC filings and regulatory disclosures.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: BlackRock onchain fund expansion signals institutional tokenization window opening; fintech payments incumbents have high optionality and scale. Market hasn't priced binary partnership announcement risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (May 5)—BlackRock tokenization push; SEC Atkins market structure hearing; legacy finance defensive positioning around onchain rails.

investment_theses.thesis: Energy crisis from Iran Strait blockade drives crude +8–15% by Q3 2026; energy ETFs (XLE, IYE) and oil majors (XOM, CVX) outperform; long crude via USO.
supporting_signals: CNBC (May 5)—Iran blockade loss of "nearly a billion barrels" with "shortage growing worse every day."
US sanctions on Iran energy supply chain entities (May 5) reduce arbitrage export options.
Trump-Xi summit delays mean geopolitical risk premium persists rather than dissipates.
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran escalates to direct US conflict, triggering demand destruction and recession hedge (crude crashes); OR US negotiates quick ceasefire, blockade lifts, and supply normalizes faster than priced.
investment_theses.expression: Long XLE (Energy Select Sector SPDR) or USO (crude ETF); short long-duration growth tech (QQQ hedge).

investment_theses.thesis: Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows sustain through June 2026 (7+ consecutive weeks); BTC reaches $87k–$92k; micro-cap crypto alts (AURA, BILL, VVV, ICP, PENGU) rally +40–80% as capital seeks yield and AI agent narratives.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph (May 5)—6 consecutive weeks of spot BTC ETF inflows, first in 9 months.
BTC holding >$80k despite $268M May outflow; technical support intact.
Hacker News AI agent adoption (ChatGPT 5.5, Claude Code, OpenAI WebRTC); CoinDesk AI agent wallet rebuild narrative at Consensus Miami.
Trending: AURA, BILL, VVV, ICP, PENGU—all AI/infrastructure-adjacent tokens showing retail/smart-money accumulation.
investment_theses.counter_view: New Fed chair signals hawkish pivot or recession indicators spike; spot ETF flows reverse; BTC consolidates $75k–$80k; alts collapse 30–50%.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC 1–3x leverage (Bybit/Deribit Dec 2026 call spreads); Long micro-cap basket (equal-weight AURA, BILL, VVV 10% allocation to higher-risk portfolio).

investment_theses.thesis: Tokenization and onchain finance infrastructure (BlackRock, SEC Atkins rulemaking, CLARITY Act passage) drives institutional Ethereum and L2 protocol tokens higher; ETH/BTC ratio expands 5–10% by Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk (May 5)—BlackRock deepening tokenization push with new onchain fund offerings.
SEC Chair Atkins signaling new onchain markets and AI-driven finance rules (May 5).
CLARITY Act markup May 14, 2026—crypto industry regulatory tailwind.
Trust Wallet, Mesh AI agent wallet ecosystem targeting Ethereum L2s (Arbitrum, Optimism, Base) for user distribution.
investment_theses.counter_view: SEC regulatory crackdown on staking, yield, or token classification delays tokenization adoption 12+ months; Ethereum execution risks on scaling; ETH/BTC contracts instead of rallies.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH 3–6 month calls (Deribit); long Ethereum L2 governance tokens (OP, ARB via Uniswap); long ratio trade ETH/BTC +5% overweight.

investment_theses.thesis: US auto credit resilience (Capital One stability data, rising median payments absorbed without delinquency) signals consumer balance sheet durability; defensive auto stocks (KMX, F, GM) and auto finance (LMT, GS credit arms) outperform tech during rotation; long financials (XLF) +5–8% vs. QQQ through summer 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC (May 5)—Capital One auto lending stability despite median payments rising $135 in 7 years.
Vehicle cost-to-income ratio holding stable, indicating structural pricing power and consumer resilience.
Rising rates have not triggered credit stress in auto loan cohorts yet; origination velocity remains strong.
investment_theses.counter_view: Recession shock hits lower-income vehicle buyers; auto loan delinquencies spike; financial contagion spreads to credit card and mortgage cohorts; XLF corrects 10–15%.
investment_theses.expression: Long XLF (Financials ETF) vs. short QQQ (2:1 ratio hedge); long KMX (CarMax) as canary for consumer stability; use DXY short to hedge Fed cuts risk.

investment_theses.thesis: Nvidia's $40B+ equity deployment in AI infrastructure creates sustained demand for semiconductor supply chain; MU (Micron), ASML, QCOM benefit from capacity expansion; semiconductor ETFs (XSD, SMH) outperform broad market +7–12% by Q4 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC (May 5)—Nvidia deploying $40B+ in equity bets across AI infrastructure stack with commercial deals.
Hacker News AI adoption velocity (ChatGPT 5.5, Claude Code, OpenAI WebRTC) implies accelerating hardware refresh cycles.
36Kr (Chinese sources)—DeepSeek fundraising (500B+ CNY rumor) signals Chinese AI capex secular trend; ASML, chip export restrictions create supply scarcity premium.
investment_theses.counter_view: AI capex cliff if LLM training roi plateaus; chip oversupply from TSMC/Samsung capacity additions; semiconductor cycle peaks in H2 2026; SMH corrects 15–20%.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMH (Semiconductor ETF) or MU 6–9 month calls; long ASML calls (supply bottleneck proxy); short QQQ call premium to fund position (call spread).
